title: Bridge Essay: Selfhood and alterity: schizophrenic experience between Blankenburg and Tatossia

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Selfhood, and, alterity:, schizophrenic, experience.

**Selfhood and alterity: schizophrenic experience between Blankenburg and Tatossian.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 37484111. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2023.1214474. This paper presents acritical comparison between two phenomenological accounts of schizophrenic experience: on the one side, Blankenburg'sseminal work on the basal disturbance (Grundstörung) of schizophrenia as loss of natural self-evidence (Natürlichen Selbstverständlichkeit); on the other side, Tatossian'sinsight, briefly elaborated in alecture presented in Heidelberg in 1994 and largely forgotten by the relevant literature.
